Name: Splunk - Forward File
Description: Configures splunk forwarding for the specified file. (The splunk forwarder service should be installed on the target server)

Parameters.Name: File
Parameters.Label: File
Parameters.HelpText: The path to the file to forward

Parameters.Name: Index
Parameters.Label: Index
Parameters.HelpText: The Splunk index to forward to

Parameters.Name: AppName
Parameters.Label: App name
Parameters.HelpText: The application name outputting to the file
